control_spine.goal: KOSMO local control spine over Odysseus with safe Home-PC handover

lanes.label: Odysseus Runtime
lanes.next_action: Odysseus laufen lassen und bei Fehlern odysseus-vanilla-smoke.sh erneut ausfuehren.

lanes.label: KOSMO Ollama Modell
lanes.next_action: odysseus-kosmo-model-sync.sh apply ausfuehren, falls der Endpoint driftet.

lanes.label: Desktop Artefakte
lanes.next_action: Vanilla/Desktop-Gates neu bauen, falls Manifest oder ZIP fehlt.

lanes.label: Home-PC Linux Handover
lanes.next_action: kosmo-home-pc-linux-handover-zip.sh neu ausfuehren und Checksum pruefen.

lanes.label: Home-PC Start Readiness
lanes.next_action: kosmo-home-pc-start-dry-run.sh ausfuehren und fehlende Pflichtchecks beheben.

lanes.label: KosmoOrbit Interface
lanes.next_action: Orbit bleibt review-only; naechster Hebel ist die sichtbare Odysseus/KOSMO-Statusbruecke.

lanes.label: GitHub Trennung
lanes.evidence: Decision pack proposed repo=Imperigo/Architekturkosmos_Codex_Starter; waiting for owner-go.
lanes.next_action: Eigenes Imperigo/Architekturkosmos_Codex_Starter Repo anlegen oder Import explizit freigeben.

home_pc_handover.purpose: Machine-readable Linux handover index for the future Home-PC setup.

github_separation_decision.evidence: Decision pack proposed repo=Imperigo/Architekturkosmos_Codex_Starter; waiting for owner-go.
blocked_until: First push uses a review branch, not main.
forbidden_without_owner_go: push starter tree into website repository

checks.label: Night status carries the KOSMO control-spine goal.
Progress percent is a valid number between 0 and 100.
Progress bar is present for UI handoff.
All KOSMO control-spine lanes are present.
At least six of seven lanes are ready.
KOSMO Ollama model lane is ready.
Home-PC start readiness lane is ready.
GitHub separation remains blocked until a dedicated Starter repo or explicit import approval exists.
All safety policy flags are present and true.
Local starter, cloud starter and Orbit website sources are represented.
Bridge can run from a repo-local demo status without a private local path.

next_actions: GitHub Separation Decision Pack owner-seitig bestaetigen oder Repo-Erstellung weiter blockiert lassen.
Dediziertes GitHub-Repo fuer den Starter anlegen oder Import-Ziel freigeben.
Home-PC Linux Handover auf Zielmaschine testen und erste Memory/Worker-Sync-Probe fahren.
